title: ChangelogSection settings component — branch selector
summary: New client component ChangelogSection.tsx added to components/settings/. Renders a branch dropdown loaded from GET /api/projects/[id]/branches and a Save button that calls PATCH /api/projects/[id] with { changelogBranch }. Handles loading skeleton, saving spinner, success flash, and error states.
business_context: The PATCH /api/projects/[id] endpoint (Task 4) and the branches API route (Task 3) are already implemented. This component is the user-facing control that lets project owners configure which branch the changelog syncs from — closing the full loop from DB field to UI settings panel.
affected_users: Project owners accessing the project settings page
acceptance_criteria: Dropdown loads branches from GET /api/projects/[id]/branches on mount
If currentBranch is set but not returned by the API it is prepended to the list
Save button calls PATCH /api/projects/[id] with { changelogBranch: selected }
Loading state shows animated pulse skeleton while fetching branches
Saving state disables the button and shows '...'
Success state shows '✓ Gespeichert' for 2 seconds then resets
Error messages from the API or network are displayed below the dropdown
Visual style matches RepoSection.tsx: zinc-900 card, zinc-800 border, indigo-600 button
TypeScript reports no errors in the new file
